executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: blocked-channel-recovery in live Gateway error state with 769 repeated timeouts — the attempt_history blob for dev.to is unbounded (~100 repeating entries of the same 3 actions) and likely the timeout root cause; marketing independent verification still stale/failing.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: bound or truncate the unblocker attempt_history to prevent the recovery job from loading and re-processing hundreds of duplicate entries every run, which is the probable cause of the 326s hang → 600s timeout.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery: live error with 769 repeated timeouts — unbounded attempt_history is likely root cause
findings.mechanism: Live cron shows status=error, lastError='cron: job execution timed out' (326s/600s). Health monitor escalation critical with 769 repeats. The dev.to channel attempt_history contains ~100 nearly-identical entries of the same 3 actions (verify_browser_readiness, prepare_manual_api_key_request, check_auth_status), each ~500 bytes, creating a multi-KB blob that the unblocker agent must parse every run. This bloat plus the model context load from re-processing the entire history likely exceeds the 600s timeout.
findings.root_cause: The unblocker's attempt_history array is append-only and unbounded. With ~100 duplicate entries for a single channel (dev.to) that is blocked pending a manual user action (API key), every recovery run re-processes this growing payload until the 600s timeout kills it.
findings.recommended_fix: Bound attempt_history to last N entries per channel (e.g. last 5). For channels blocked on manual user action with no path forward, short-circuit early and skip re-processing. This is a code fix in agents/unblocker/run.py.

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails (verdict=fail, checked 2026-05-28, artifact age ~4253 min ~= 3 days).
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for primary-repo adoption is still missing; artifact not refreshed in ~3 days.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology coherent — 26/26 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 known error
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection: 26 total, 26 enabled, 0 disabled, 5 running, 1 last-error (blocked-channel-recovery). Zero topology leakage from persisted disabled history into live runtime.
findings.root_cause: Architecture/runtime topology is coherent; the single error is the known blocked-channel-recovery timeout issue.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain direct cron inspection as source of truth.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path fully green after indep-verification refresh
findings.mechanism: Verifier resolved the stale-indep-artifact error from the prior run. Loop integrity passes for ralph-docs-watchdog and agent-architecture-watchdog. Independent architecture verification: ok=true, qualified_pass=true. Docs verifier independently passing.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining blockers (blocked-channel-recovery, marketing) are external-owner issues.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep independent verification refreshed after each material architecture artifact change.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only
findings.mechanism: 5 disabled entries exist in persisted jobs.json history; zero disabled jobs in live topology.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job removal/disable cleanup.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Bound unblocker attempt_history to prevent timeout on blocked-channel-recovery (critical, 769 repeats, live error)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: The recovery job has been timing out since 2026-05-28. The unbounded attempt_history (dev.to ~100 duplicate entries) is the probable root cause. This is a code fix, not a manual investigation.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops the timeout loop; allows blocked-channel-recovery to complete normally and report channel states without hanging.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing independent verification is ~3 days stale and still failing; this blocks whole-stack certification.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Maintain live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Live inspection is largely clean (1 known error) and should remain the source of truth.

Identified unbounded attempt_history (~100 duplicate entries for dev.to channel) as probable 326s→600s timeout root cause. The agent re-processes the entire history payload every run. Fix: bound history or short-circuit channels with no forward path.
